message:
test(wasm): serialize host connection tests with mutex guard

Add `host_connection_test_guard()` to prevent race conditions between
WASM integration tests that create in-memory connections on the host.
These tests share global state (connection pools, MVCC internals) and
were intermittently failing under `cargo test --jobs=N` due to
concurrent access.

Applied to:
- core_connection_roundtrip_for_wasm_wrapper
- core_prepared_statement_exposes_inferred_column_names
- franken_db_prepare_and_execute_batch_work_on_host

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
